mapper.select: select p.policy_no, ph.holder_name as policy_holder_name, p.policy_status, p.product_code, cast(max(pr.payment_date) as char) as last_payment_date, count(distinct case when cc.claim_status in ('PENDING', 'UNDER_REVIEW') then cc.claim_no end) as open_claim_count from policy p inner join policy_holder ph on ph.id = p.holder_id left join payment_record pr on pr.policy_no = p.policy_no left join claim_case cc on cc.policy_no = p.policy_no where p.policy_no = #{policyNo} group by p.policy_no, ph.holder_name, p.policy_status, p.product_code
